items.title: Connect to our ⚡Lighning Node⚡!
items.summary: As bitcoiners it is important for us to promote and enable hyperbitcoinisation. We are very prood to operate our central ⚡Lightning Network⚡ node in San Salvador, in a secured datacenter on optic-filber with the best possible uptime. Of course we typically apply zero fees policy.
items.content_html:
As bitcoiners it is important for us to promote and enable hyperbitcoinisation.
We are very prood to operate our central ⚡Lightning Network⚡ node in San Salvador, in a secured datacenter on optic-filber with the best possible uptime.
Of course we typically apply zero fees policy. We believe in the human network effect.
Having you connect our node would be an honor ❤️

Public key:
